office_does: The auditor administers elections, records, licensing, county finances, and public-facing statutory services.
race_blurb: Senior deputy auditor and councilmember Crystn Guenthner offers direct office and elected experience; county IT employee Kenneth Millar emphasizes systems security and stewardship.

candidates.summary: Guenthner is the senior deputy auditor and a Colfax councilmember emphasizing secure elections, records, licensing, accuracy, accountability, and steady service.
highlights: Has served on the Colfax City Council since 2018 [S2]

spending.basis: Accountability and accurate financial administration support an oversight orientation.

experience.basis: Direct senior auditor-office work plus elected council service establish a strong proven record.

candidates.summary: Millar works in county information technology and has poll-worker and Census recruiting experience, emphasizing security, accuracy, transparency, and stewardship.
highlights: Has county IT and poll-worker experience [S1][S2]
Emphasizes system security, accurate finances, and taxpayer stewardship [S2]

spending.basis: Taxpayer stewardship and financial accountability support a modest oversight lean.

experience.basis: Relevant county IT and poll-worker experience supports renewal but prevents a maximal outsider placement.
